horoscope: You might recognize the need to let go of certain things that are cluttering up your life, dear Aries, and clearing things out can be liberating. With Venus and Uranus falling into alignment today for the final time in your resources sector, you can feel a strong desire to start fresh, approach things differently, and make changes and improvements. You’re inclined to do things differently, especially with people and money! Your tastes can be unconventional, or you may feel compelled to try something new. Indeed, if old methods aren’t satisfying, it’s time to shake things up a little. You could make discoveries along financial lines or make a fantastic find, although impulsive spending can be problematic. Connections with others can inspire you in your creative or business life.

Today's Venus-Uranus alignment occurs in your sign, dear Taurus, as it has for years now. However, today's transit is the final one before Uranus moves on in just two days, this time for the long haul. It points to incredible personal appeal today, along with a feeling of freshness and invigoration. There can be surprises related to money, work, or love. A craving for more variety may steer you in exciting new directions. You won’t tolerate limitations and restrictions, but as rebellious or defiant as you may feel, you express these traits in pleasant ways. You can be full of surprises, and people around you may not know what to expect from you. Try to battle the urge to make a quick move. Fortunately, your intuition for making changes kicks in, and you can make some fascinating discoveries, particularly about yourself or your image.

Today's Venus-Uranus transit inspires you to do things a little differently, dear Gemini. Try not to be abrupt when letting something go, as the key may be to distinguish between rebellious feelings and a genuine need for change. Venus aligns with Uranus shortly before both planets head into your sign, pointing to an awakening of your inner eye or your deeper feelings about a matter. Uranus will be moving into your sign in just two days, and this time around, it will be there for the long haul. Today, you might enjoy a coincidence that brings up wonderful memories or unexpected feelings. There may be a private attraction, or you’re inspired and motivated by a shared secret or special moment. You might stir the pot now, whether knowingly or not, and the results can be exciting. It’s not a good day for being confined, so if you can help it, try to keep a light schedule. A past love, whether it’s a person or pursuit, can quite suddenly become more relevant today. It’s a day of discovery, and keeping your mind open to changes and improvements is a good strategy now.

Today's transits are powerful for your connection with your intuition, dear Cancer. A Venus-Uranus alignment enlivens your interactions with friends or lovers. You can feel happily detached just enough from a matter that once weighed you down. Friendships can bring surprises today, or you could see a friend in a new light. It's an excellent time for exploration on a social level or with special ideas, dreams, and plans. It’s wise to check in with yourself that you’re making choices, not merely reacting, since this energy can sometimes produce rebellion rather than draw on true self-knowledge. Still, those areas of your life that could use an update are standing out today. Be sure to break the routine even just a little to make the most of the day.

With Venus and Uranus aligning today, dear Leo, the desire for something a little different is in the spotlight. This transit stirs excitement, change, and stimulation — perhaps even some agitation — with work, business relationships, or your image, status, or reputation. Bosses, other higher-ups, or the public, in general, might see you in a special light, appreciating your unique qualities. Your creativity can now be on display in some way. This might also be a time for a breakthrough in a project, venture, or relationship. Alternatively, it may become apparent that you need to make a few adjustments in the way you approach your work or pursue your goals. Listen to creative inspiration stirring now, but aim to answer true impulses rather than rebellious or reactive feelings. Connecting with a partner or sharing ideas with someone close to you can also be rewarding today.

You may be craving something more from life, dear Virgo, and while this feeling can lead you to spin your wheels, you're likely to recognize -- and own -- your need for change. Getting in touch with what works best for you is in the spotlight with today's Venus-Uranus alignment in your spirit sector. You're awakening to ideas, interests, or experiences that encourage you to live more spiritedly. You're also expressing yourself particularly well, and fantastic energy is with you for social or cultural events and studies. Rewards are excellent for opening yourself up socially and for taking more creative or personal risks. You're drawing in unusual and interesting people, and your enthusiasm and originality can create a wave of activity around you. It's an excellent time to find inspiration, particularly through the eyes of someone who may see things differently than you do. Your enthusiasm can be catchy, inspiring others around you. Venus will head to the top of your solar chart, blessing your material goals, and Uranus will do so the next day, stirring things up.

You're turning your attention to areas of life that could use some change, updates, and a more forward-looking approach today, dear Libra, with your ruler, Venus, aligning with Uranus today. The sudden urge to push boundaries can figure strongly now. Intimate relationships or feelings are likely to heat up suddenly, or this is a time when you awaken to feelings you've buried or denied. Keep an open mind and heart and see where they lead you. You may need to pull yourself out of your comfort zone a little to get what you want or deserve, but the results can be exciting. It's a time for being bold about taking care of yourself and your needs, but it may be best to save the more significant decisions for a time when you've processed your feelings. Uranus can stir reactive, rebellious feelings at times, and it's best to be sure you're answering your true desires rather than reactions. This can also be a time of revelations about money, relationships, or sharing.

A desire for change can drive you today, dear Scorpio, and it can stir you to push boundaries. An alignment of Venus with Uranus, the awakener, in your partnership sector can bring surprises. While this alignment has occurred in this area of your solar chart for many years, this one is the last one before Uranus moves into your solar eighth house. The opportunity to embrace and enjoy changes or fresh, new approaches, particularly in your relationships, can emerge. You might attract people who bring change into your life, or there can be spontaneous activities or strong, sudden attractions in the spotlight now. If you've been unhappy with some aspect of your life, now is the time to work on improving it. Otherwise, you can feel nervous or impatient today. A bit of discomfort can turn into a fabulous learning experience with an open mind.

Although events won't necessarily unfold exactly as planned today, dear Sagittarius, you’re in a flowing mood, and very little can truly get you down today, except perhaps routine! Today's Venus-Uranus alignment produces energy that's anything but routine, so you’re sure to experience a real mix of feelings and circumstances. You have a taste for something different, unique, and exciting, and with this forward-looking transit, you’ll see where life can use some significant tweaking. A breakthrough in a relationship, at work, or in your health is now possible as you open yourself to new approaches. Tap into your intuition regarding making changes, as it’s trying to tell you something. Be sure you are choosing rather than reacting when you make decisions. As well, aim to observe rather than rush into action. A new idea or even meeting someone special can come from pursuing your daily routines, health, wellness, or work. This meeting of the planet of love and pleasure with the planet of change and excitement occurs in your health, work, and habits sector, and there may be some unexpected developments or interruptions that lead to new thinking or directions along these lines.

If you've been sitting on feelings that need release, dear Capricorn, they're likely to find a channel for expression today. Venus and Uranus align in your romance and creativity sector, inspiring you to make changes. Love can bring surprises today, and buried emotions may awaken. You may need to lay to rest some aspects of your past if they're no longer serving you well. Eventually, these will pave the way to a new beginning. This transit helps you detach just enough to enjoy yourself more fully. There can be romantic or creative excitement, and you might capture the attention of people who hadn't noticed you previously. Your usual inhibitions on a social or creative level melt away, and you can feel pleasantly engaged or willing to take a small risk. You might also experience a sudden attraction that surprises you.

Feeling just a tad unsettled can push you in the direction of change today, dear Aquarius. Today's Venus-Uranus alignment can break down inhibitions and help you tap into your intuition. You're a little less attached to the past, and getting rid of something you no longer need is likely to feel far more liberating than uncomfortable. The need for more oomph in your personal life or routines can overcome you now. Excitement in your sector of roots, home, and family can prompt a spontaneous activity, whim, or decision to make dynamic changes and improvements to your home or personal life. It can be a lively time for home improvement or an open spirit with loved ones that encourages a fresh new approach to relating. Alternatives prompt you to rethink old problems and concerns, particularly those related to living arrangements and conditions. You want to do things a little differently today, and it's a happy, rewarding choice.

Doing your own thing today can be liberating in some ways, dear Pisces, but sharing yourself with others is more of an inclination now. As Venus and Uranus align in your communication sector, this can be an excellent time to come up with an inspired idea or discover a compelling new interest. Aim to embrace the potential for pleasant surprises or even new friendships that can result from short trips, errands, and learning pursuits. You may have the opportunity to start a conversation with a sibling, a relative, a fellow student, or a neighbor. This can be a time to hear or read about something that inspires you in exciting ways. Others can bring delightful surprises to your life. How you express yourself can be especially unique and appealing to someone special. You are ready to start fresh, turn a corner, try new things, and approach your relationships differently.
